scene_input.scene_summary: Prophet gathers Anṣār leaders to discuss fay' distribution
scene_input.key_visual_action: Prophet standing, hands clasped, addressing Anṣār leaders
scene_input.setting: Medina, outdoors, under a palm tree

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 193
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of leadership and community involvement

characters.name: The central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, hands clasped together

characters.name: Anṣār leader
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a plain white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, looking respectfully at the central figure

characters.name: Anṣār leader
characters.appearance: slender build, wearing a plain white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, looking respectfully at the central figure

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet stood under a palm tree in Medina, addressing the Anṣār leaders about the distribution of fay'. He wanted to make sure they were involved in the decision-making process.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A sunny afternoon in Medina, with a clear blue sky and a few puffy white clouds. A tall palm tree stands in the center, its trunk thick and gnarled, with a few branches stretching upwards. The central figure stands under the palm tree, seen from behind, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. His hands are clasped together in a gentle gesture. Two Anṣār leaders stand facing him, looking respectfully at the central figure. One leader is of medium build, wearing a plain white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering. The other leader is slender, wearing a plain white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering. Soft warm sunlight casts a gentle glow on the scene. Medium shot at eye level. Warm beige, cream, and blue palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
